description: Dynamic What-If Simulator Enhancement - Add a custom What-If API endpoint and update the frontend simulator to compute dynamic results using the linear approximation formula from the ML notebooks instead of only matching pre-computed scenarios.
steps: Step 1: Create new API endpoint `api/src/functions/whatif-custom.ts`. Register as `app.http('whatif-custom', { methods: ['POST'], authLevel: 'anonymous', route: 'whatif-custom', handler })`. The endpoint accepts JSON body: { infrastructure_delta: number, internet_delta: number, bank_distance_delta: number, target_kabupaten: string }. It should: (a) Load UMKM data via getUmkmData() from api/src/data/loader.ts, (b) Filter UMKMs by target_kabupaten (match on kabupaten_kota field), (c) Compute new_score for each UMKM using formula: new_score = skor_potensi + (infrastructure_delta * 0.66) + (internet_delta * 0.33) + (bank_distance_delta * 0.01), cap at 100, (d) Return: { affected_count, avg_score_before, avg_score_after, avg_improvement, umkm_crossing_70_threshold (count of UMKMs that went from <70 to >=70), pct_improved, max_improvement }. Add WhatIfCustomRequest and WhatIfCustomResponse interfaces to api/src/shared/types.ts.

Step 2: Update `frontend/lib/api.ts` to add a new function `postWhatIfCustom(body: { infrastructure_delta: number; internet_delta: number; bank_distance_delta: number; target_kabupaten: string })` that POSTs to `/api/whatif-custom`. On failure or if BASE_URL is empty, compute the result client-side using the same formula against kecamatanMapData from static-data.ts (use score as base, filter by kabupaten).

Step 3: Update `frontend/app/(dashboard)/location-intelligence/page.tsx` to add a 'Custom Simulation' section below the existing What-If Simulator. This section should include: (a) A dropdown to select target_kabupaten (reuse kabupatenOptions), (b) Three sliders for infrastructure_delta (-30 to +30), internet_delta (-30 to +30), bank_distance_delta (-50 to +50), (c) A 'Run Custom Simulation' button that calls the new API, (d) Results display showing: affected UMKM count, avg before/after scores, improvement, and count crossing 70-point threshold. Keep the existing pre-computed scenario matching above this new section. Style with glass-card, consistent with the page.
Step 4: Verify the API compiles with `pnpm build` in api/ directory. Verify the frontend builds with `pnpm build` in frontend/. Run `pnpm test:ci` in frontend/ to verify no regressions.
acceptance_criteria: New file api/src/functions/whatif-custom.ts exists and compiles without errors (pnpm build in api/)
Frontend builds without errors (pnpm build in frontend/)
The Location Intelligence page shows a new 'Custom Simulation' section with kabupaten selector, delta sliders, and computed results
Client-side fallback computation works when API is unavailable
All existing tests still pass (pnpm test:ci)
verification: Run `pnpm build` in api/ directory and confirm no TypeScript errors
Run `pnpm build` in frontend/ directory and confirm static export succeeds
Run `pnpm test:ci` in frontend/ directory and confirm all 25+ tests pass
findings: API requires pnpm install before build (node_modules not pre-installed). All 25 frontend tests pass. API compiles cleanly with tsc. Frontend static export succeeds with 16 pages.
